---
title: "Build Social Signals of Jobs ratings site"
output: html_document
---

This .Rmd is just a build script. The real site is `index.html`, generated by
`build.R` from the source `.dta` plus the `body.html` template and `app.js`/`app.css`.

To rebuild after the data changes:

```bash
Rscript build.R
```

Or from inside R / RStudio:

```{r build, eval=FALSE}
source("build.R")
```
